business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC GLFS 2025 8820; 2024 carrier - 10 claims, no cancellations

positives: 38 years in business with 25 years under current management
GPS tracking/ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations
CDL licenses verified for all drivers
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years
CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold (currently being addressed)
Elevated claim frequency: 10-13 claims per year across recent policy periods
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Loss history over past three years shows consistent claim activity: 10 claims in 2024 (Hanover), 13 claims in 2023 (Hartford), and 12 claims in 2022 (Auto-Owners). No cancellations. Prior insurance docs needed per reviewer annotation.

fleet_summary.radius_of_operation: Interstate (FMCSA) — Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors; long-haul operations with sleeper-cab tractors

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 6:00 AM - 4:30 PM. Primary commodities: Dry van general freight, packaged goods; Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery. Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations. Refrigerated reefer units used for perishable freight.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire. Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations. Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Hanover Insurance Group - premium $2,066,013.36, 10 claims; 2023 Hartford Financial Services - premium $2,074,475.36, 13 claims; 2022 Auto-Owners Insurance - premium $2,014,585.01, 12 claims. No cancellations across any period. CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score is above intervention threshold and is currently being addressed. DOT violations or out-of-service orders occurred in past 3 years.
